uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds status frame. battery 0x24=36 -> 3.6 V; current 0x000303=771 mA; byte[9]=1 shock/movement detected -> action.motion.detected true. expected.data authored against the normalized contract.

uplink.description: Status report, no shock, low battery and low-current alarm
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds status frame. battery 0xA4: high bit set -> lowBattery true, 0x24=36 -> 3.6 V; current 100 mA; byte[8] bit0 set -> lowCurrentAlarm true; byte[9]=0 -> action.motion.detected false.
Synthetic frame using the upstream startup-report input shape (reportType byte[3]=0). Carries only firmware/version metadata, no normalized measurement -> error.
